basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website of Mahatma Gandhi University. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MGU Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.Sc Physics with expertise in the operation and maintenance of material characterization equipments like X-ray diffractometer, FTIR spectrometer, Photoluminescence spectrophotometer, Thermogravimetric analyser, Ellipsometer etc. Minimum one year experience in the operation and maintenance of material characterization equipments in a research centre is desirable.

all_official_links.label: Download MGU Technical Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this MGU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this Mahatma Gandhi University recruitment is Technical Assistant. This is a temporary position on a daily wage basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Technical Assistant post in this recruitment drive by Mahatma Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc Physics degree with expertise in operating and maintaining material characterization equipment. One year of relevant experience is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be paid a daily wage of Rs. 665 per day for the Technical Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this MGU recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates do not need to apply online beforehand.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Technical Assistant post is scheduled to be held on 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the Walk-in Interview take place?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the office of the Director, School of Pure & Applied Physics, Mahatma Gandhi University, Kottayam, Kerala.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification should be referred to for specific age limit details. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government norms.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The job type for this Technical Assistant post at Mahatma Gandhi University is Temporary, offered on a daily wage basis.
